parameters.query: SELECT * FROM demographics WHERE patient_id = $1::uuid AND is_current = true LIMIT 1

UPDATE demographics SET is_current = false WHERE patient_id = $1::uuid AND is_current = true;
INSERT INTO demographics (patient_id, occupation, marital_status, number_of_children, education_level, religion, is_current)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4::integer, $5, $6, true)
RETURNING *
